title: COINTELPRO Black Extremist Part 01
creator: Federal Bureau of Investigation
subject: Cold War
description: Document introduces the Counterintelligence Program Black Nationalist – Hate Group division, including Atlanta, Baltimore, Boston, Buffalo, Charlotte, Chicago, Cincinnati, Cleveland, Detroit, Jackson, Los Angeles, Memphis, Newark, New Orleans, New York, Philadelphia, Phoenix, Richmond, St. Louis, San Francisco, and the Washington Field Office. The document describes the nature of the program's covert operations and indicates the program's confidential status. The Sections included end stating, 'You are urged to take an enthusiastic and imaginative approach to this new counterintelligence endeavor, and the Bureau will be pleased to entertain any suggestions or techniques you may recommend.'

title: COINTELPRO New Left New York Part 02 (Final)
creator: Federal Bureau of Investigation
subject: Cold War
description: New Left Counter-Intelligence program focused on Columbia University student movements, including the Student Democratic Socialist organization. The document provides an example of a destabilization practice towards the SDS.
